description_long: This is a modern tactical axe with a sleek, all-black finish and a robust, angular blade. The blade features a wide cutting edge with a slightly curved profile and a pointed tip, suitable for both chopping and piercing tasks. The handle is ergonomically contoured with finger grooves and a textured grip, designed for secure handling and control. There are cutouts in the head and handle, likely for weight reduction and balance, as well as a pointed pommel at the base for additional utility. The axe appears to be constructed from a single piece of metal, giving it a monolithic and durable appearance. Its overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative markings or branding.
description: A modern, all-black tactical axe with a wide angular blade, contoured handle, and utility cutouts. The design is sleek, robust, and functional.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe, highlighting the wide blade, ergonomic handle, and utility cutouts.
description_view_1: Edge-on view displaying the thinness of the blade and handle, emphasizing the axe's streamlined profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the blade, handle contours, and cutouts from the other side.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side of view 1, again showing the thin profile and straight alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic handle with finger grooves and a textured, grippy surface; likely made of steel with a polymer overlay; cross-section appears oval.
attribute_blade_design: Wide, angular blade with a single curved cutting edge, pointed tip, and integrated cutouts for weight reduction; no beard or poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Monolithic, full-tang construction with the blade and handle formed from a single piece of metal.
